_meta.description: LLM provider configs. Edit or use 'check_quota.py --add'. Scraper: scrape_dashboards.py (CDP).

zai.name: Z.AI
zai.notes: Coding Plan. Shows 5h/weekly/monthly quota %, token usage chart

dashscope.name: DashScope (Alibaba)
dashscope.steps: Navigate → hover '套餐用量' box → screenshot
dashscope.notes: Coding Plan Pro. $50/month. Shows weekly usage %, remaining days

anthropic.name: Anthropic
anthropic.notes: Shows session/weekly/extra usage %, spend vs limit, balance, reset times

kimi.name: Kimi (Moonshot)
kimi.steps: Navigate → screenshot (no interaction needed). Page loads slowly.
kimi.notes: K2.5 Allegretto. Weekly + rate limit usage %

minimax.name: MiniMax
minimax.steps: Navigate → screenshot (no interaction needed). No weekly limit.

deepseek.name: DeepSeek
deepseek.notes: Added from template, not yet configured
